commit.message:
Fix silence watchdog firing before customer speaks

The 5s timer was starting right after the greeting, hanging up before
the customer could say anything. Now the watchdog waits until the
customer has spoken at least once (speech_started or transcription
completed) before beginning the silence countdown.

commit.message:
fix(mac): resolve EXC_BREAKPOINT SIGTRAP with hardenedRuntime + entitlements

Root cause: macOS 26 (and 13+) requires explicit JIT and library-loading
permissions even when distributing without an Apple Developer certificate.
Setting hardenedRuntime: false was insufficient — macOS 26 still enforces
new security restrictions that block V8 JIT without proper entitlements.

Fix:
- hardenedRuntime: true  (keep HR active — required on macOS 26)
- New entitlements.mac.plist grants: JIT (cs.allow-jit), unsigned
  executable memory, dyld env vars, and disable-library-validation
  (needed to load the Prisma .dylib.node engine without Developer ID)
- Both entitlements + entitlementsInherit set so all helper processes
  (GPU, Renderer, Plugin) inherit the same permissions

After installing the DMG, open with right-click → Open (first time only)
OR run: sudo xattr -cr /Applications/Sistema\ Jurídico.app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix window index collision detection for terminated agents

The previous approach checked session.status to find active windows,
but once un-persisted the collision was invisible. Now uses start_time
to determine the rightful owner when multiple sessions share a window
index, and auto-persists terminated for the losers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Earthquake/cyclone/volcano filtering + history search fix

Earthquake threshold (Worker.js):
- NATURAL_MIN_MAGNITUDE: 5.5 → 5.0 with strict > check (not >=)
- M ≤ 5.0 now guaranteed filtered at all 4 check points (lines 1766,
  1823, 3018, 5281) — previously M5.0 could pass >= 5.0 check
- Only M > 5.0 (i.e. M5.1+) are reported

Cyclones/Hurricanes — major events only (Worker.js):
- Added filter: skip GDACS TC events where alertLevel !== 'red'
- Orange = Cat 1-2 (now excluded), Red = Cat 3+ major cyclone only

Volcanoes — major activity only (Worker.js):
- Same filter: skip GDACS VO events where alertLevel !== 'red'
- Only Red-level (severe eruption / VEI 4+) events are reported

History Search fix (app.js):
- Root bug: flatpickr was inside `if (dates.length === 0) return;`
  block, so if archive API returned empty array, the calendar never
  initialized and the readonly input couldn't be clicked at all
- Fix: init flatpickr unconditionally at page load with maxDate=today
- Archive dates are then applied asynchronously as restrictions
- Calendar now always opens on first click regardless of archive state

Fix search query performance: use ilike instead of func.upper()

matching. Also added UPPER() indexes on city and state columns.

commit.message:
Rearchitect scene generation: code splits, Groq only generates prompts

- Script splitting now done by code (splitScriptIntoScenes) — 2 sentences per
  scene in smart mode, 1 per scene in exact mode — no AI needed for splitting
- Groq receives pre-split batches of 30 scenes and returns only image_prompt,
  fallback_prompts, scene_type, historical_period, visual_priority per scene
- tts_text set in code (= script_text) — never sent to Groq, saves tokens
- Switched to openai/gpt-oss-120b (131k context, 65k output, ~500 tps on Groq)
- max_tokens: 32000 — plenty of room for 30 scenes per call
- Batch size 30 scenes: 5,000-word script needs only ~6 API calls (~24s total)

container. Use tmpfs for a writable in-memory filesystem
that avoids all Docker Desktop permission issues.

- added "already merged" guard in all basic-checks implementations

- applied consistently across GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Azure DevOps, and shared scripts

logic is already thoroughly covered by unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace forced 2x3 grid fitting with adaptive clear-spot detection

Instead of trying to force exactly 6 spots per plate (which failed when
some spots have very low contrast), now detects only clearly visible spots
using local maxima on the score map with adaptive thresholding. Spots must
have at least 30% of the strongest signal on the plate. Row/col assignment
uses Y-position clustering instead of assuming grid order.

commit.message:
fix: use prisma db push instead of migrate deploy for builds

Production DB was created with db push, not migrations — no
_prisma_migrations table exists. db push diffs schema against
live DB state instead of replaying migration history.

fix: optimize talent dashboard/analytics candidate queries to prevent timeout

Select only required columns instead of select("*") on candidates table.
With ~5000 enriched candidates averaging 4.5KB each (47MB total), the
full select was timing out. Also fixed c.stage → c.outreach_stage to
use the actual column name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: revert parallel=8 + document Track M-4 results in checkpoint

- parallel_scenarios: 8 → 4 (parallel=8 causes PA Turn 2 rate-limit failures)
- CHECKPOINT.md: Track M-4 results documented (L2-004/005 now passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix broadcast template data binding and add live-game API

- Add /api/live-game route to fetch single game data from MLB Stats API
  (was missing, causing all score bug templates to fail silently)
- Fix createCustomRebuild to resolve sectionBinding when templateBinding
  is absent, so templates from the template builder actually bind data
- Collect all element-bound metrics in player mode, not just the 3 panel
  selections, so all bound elements receive their data
- Preserve schemaType when saving element binding changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Security, Monitoring, and Operations sections (14 new pages)

Security:
- Security Overview: dashboard of privileged pods, missing limits, host
  network, stale secrets, unprotected namespaces
- Network Policy Visualization: namespace-level policy coverage
- RBAC Audit: who has cluster-admin/admin access
- Secret Rotation: secrets by age with stale/critical flags
- Pod Security Standards: PSA enforcement levels per namespace

Observe (expanded):
- Cluster Health: overall score from nodes + pods + operators health
- Alert Rules: PrometheusRule CRs from the cluster
- Pod Resources: CPU/memory requests vs limits per pod
- Namespace Consumption: aggregate resource usage per namespace

Operations:
- Node Maintenance: cordon/uncordon/drain nodes with PATCH API
- Node Scaling: scale MachineSets with inline +/- controls
- PVC Resize: expand PersistentVolumeClaims via PATCH
- HPA Recommendations: scaling ceiling detection
- Certificate Management: TLS certificate inventory with age tracking

All pages use live K8s API data, no mock data, no inline styles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix PWA onboarding redirect: check for actual data not just flags

ProtectedRoute now checks if user has accounts/trades data, not just
onboarding flags. Prevents sending users with data to onboarding.

Removed unused initialSyncDone check since it defaults to true now.

fix: reduce code duplication with shared superclasses and template fragments

Extract TimestampedEntity (id, createdAt, updatedAt) for 28 entities and
DocumentLine (product, quantity, unitPrice, tax, amount) for InvoiceLine/BillLine.
Consolidate error page templates via parameterized fragment, merge client/vendor
statement print into unified template, extract shared aging report fragments
and print CSS fragment. Add ErrorPageTest for 403/404 coverage. Net -1,458 lines.

Connect contact form to Follow Up Boss CRM

Fix feed parsing, profile updates, and add place picker with seed data

- Fix JSON decode errors: add leftJoinAndSelect for media/author/restaurant
  in all post queries (createQueryBuilder doesn't honor eager relations)
- Make Post.media optional in iOS to handle posts without media
- Add FeedResponse wrapper to decode double-wrapped TransformInterceptor response
- Increment/decrement postCount on post create/delete
- Add GET /users/:username/posts endpoint (was missing entirely)
- Add PlacePickerView using MKLocalSearch for real restaurant discovery
- Add locationAddress field to posts
- Refresh profile on didCreatePost notification
- Seed 5 demo users and 15 posts at real Riyadh restaurant locations

commit.message:
docs(browser-tests): Browser Testing artifacts [BF-93]

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix archive banner detection — check full body text, retry on load Banner wasn't appearing on archive.ph because the content check only counted

tags (archived pages often use divs). Now checks overall body text length after stripping scripts/nav/etc. Also retries up to 5 times with 1s intervals in case content renders after the script loads — covers the case where the page is already complete but the narrow check previously failed with no MutationObserver triggers. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

fix: strengthen cs-review agent prompts — inline schemas, diff substitution, null line, conflict field

- Inline full JSON schema in agents 2-5 (performance, logic, tests, style) so each
  isolated agent prompt is self-contained; remove "Same schema as above" references
- Add null line comment to all 5 agent schemas and the Synthesizer schema
  (use null for file-level findings that don't map to a specific line)
- Add diff preparation instructions before Step 3 (fetch unified diff, replace {diff},
  truncate at 50k chars for large PRs)
- Add "conflict" field to Synthesizer output schema; update conflict rule to set
  conflict: true and merge both perspectives into body when agents disagree

commit.message:
Card pile swipe: top card flies off, next card emerges from behind

Each document is its own card in a pile. Swipe sends the top card
flying off-screen to the back of the pile, revealing the next card
which scales up with a spring overshoot animation. Works on both
touch and desktop via Pointer Events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: initial @footprintjs/explainable-ui library

Themeable React component library for visualizing FootPrint pipeline execution.

Core components (zero external deps):
- MemoryInspector: JSON memory state viewer with highlight-new
- NarrativeLog: timeline-style execution log
- GanttTimeline: horizontal stage duration bars
- SnapshotPanel: all-in-one drop-in inspector

Flowchart components (optional @xyflow/react peer dep):
- FlowchartView: pipeline graph with execution state coloring
- StageNode: custom ReactFlow node with done/active/error states
- TimeTravelDebugger: full debugger with scrubber + flowchart + data

Theme system:
- CSS custom properties (--fp-*) for zero-config theming
- Optional FootprintTheme provider for JS-based token overrides
- Size variants (compact/default/detailed) on all components
- Unstyled mode for full consumer control

Adapter:
- toVisualizationSnapshots() converts RuntimeSnapshot to viz format
- createSnapshots() helper for testing/custom data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Session: Play 3 SC-346 + shortcut-cards.py auto-redirect + safety rule

intervention — tool catches the misuse instead of relying on the user to
remember the right flag).

tooling-logistics.md: sharpened inline Python rule from quoting rationale
to safety rationale (silent mutation + retry = double-fire), added "verify
state before retrying" as adjacent level 2 note.

feat: add color affinity physics — similar-colored orbs attract each other

Orbs with similar hues now gently drift toward each other, creating
natural color clustering over time. Similar colors also repel less at
close range, letting same-colored orbs cluster tighter. Creates beautiful
emergent color neighborhoods without any new UI controls.
